name: Litix Route Servers
notes:
The following communities can be used by members on our Route Servers:
         
(0:peer-as) or (rt:0:peer-as)= Don't send route to this peer as
(58146:peer-as) or (rt:58146:peer-as) = Send route to this peer as
0:58146 = Don't send route to any peer
58146:58146 = Send route to all peers
         
If peer-as uses a 2B ASN, you may use Standard or Extended Communities
If peer-as uses a 4B ASN, you have to use Extended Communities
